About Me

Senior Email Marketing &
Automation Specialist

I am an Email Marketing and Marketing Automation Specialist with 7.5+ years of experience helping brands improve customer engagement and drive measurable business growth.

Currently working as Digital Marketing Specialist at Vinus Consulting (real estate, Delhi NCR) and associated with Vinus Global Media — a full-service digital marketing agency.

My expertise spans CRM journey building, automation workflows, audience segmentation, email deliverability, and performance marketing across Google and Meta platforms.

Real Estate Education Banking & Finance Travel Gaming E-commerce EdTech FinTech

My Professional Journey

2022 — Present
Senior Digital Marketing Specialist
Vinus Consulting | Noida, India
Leading digital marketing for a real estate channel partner in Delhi NCR. Responsible for lead generation, CRM & lead management, email and WhatsApp marketing, Google & Meta advertising, customer journey automation, and marketing analytics for residential, commercial, luxury, and investment properties.
2020 — 2022
Senior Email Marketing Specialist
OrangeMonke
Managed large-scale email marketing programs using Salesforce Marketing Cloud. Built complex automation journeys, implemented AMPscript personalization, and led deliverability optimization initiatives across multiple client accounts.
2018 — 2020
Assistant Email Marketing Specialist
OPK E Service Pvt. Ltd.
Handled email campaign execution, audience segmentation, A/B testing, and performance reporting. Worked across education, banking, and e-commerce verticals to improve open rates and engagement.
2017 — 2018
Digital Marketing Coordinator
Square Yards
Coordinated digital marketing campaigns for one of India's leading real estate platforms. Managed email campaigns, lead nurturing workflows, and cross-channel marketing initiatives.
2015 — 2017
Email Marketing Executive
Way2Online
Started career in email marketing — executed bulk email campaigns, managed subscriber lists, tracked delivery and engagement metrics, and supported performance marketing initiatives.
